/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++ -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_NAME=CRDTModule -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=[_gcounter_create,_gcounter_destroy,_gcounter_increment,_gcounter_value,_gcounter_merge,_gcounter_num_nodes,_gcounter_slot] -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=[cwrap,ccall] -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 --no-entry CMakeFiles/crdt_wasm.dir/src/gcounter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/crdt_wasm.dir/src/crdt_c_api.cpp.o -o crdt_wasm.js
